name: layrix
description: Production-ready architectural framework for scalable dashboard applications on Quasar Framework with Feature-Sliced Design (FSD)

layers.pages: Route components — widget composition only, no business logic
layers.widgets: Large self-contained UI blocks — feature composition
layers.entities: Business entities — stores, types, API methods
layers.shared: Reusable infrastructure — UI kit, utilities, API client

commands.ready: bd ready - Show issues ready to work
commands.sync: bd sync - Sync with git remote

fsd-reviewer.description: Reviews code changes for Feature-Sliced Design compliance
fsd-reviewer.purpose: Checks layer boundaries, import direction, naming conventions, and Quasar isolation rules
fsd-reviewer.usage: Use proactively after code changes that touch FSD layers

component-builder.description: Builds new shared/ui primitive components following the Quasar wrapping pattern
component-builder.purpose: Creates properly typed Vue components with props interfaces, barrel exports, and design system consistency
component-builder.usage: Use when creating new UI primitives in shared/ui/primitives/

feature-builder.description: Scaffolds and implements new feature slices following FSD conventions
feature-builder.purpose: Creates feature directory structure with UI components, model composables, types, and barrel exports
feature-builder.usage: Use when adding new user actions or feature slices in features/[domain]/[action]/

architecture-auditor.description: Audits the entire Layrix codebase for FSD architecture violations
architecture-auditor.purpose: Comprehensive check: import rule breaches, Quasar isolation issues, structural inconsistencies
architecture-auditor.usage: Use when you need a comprehensive health check of the project architecture

beads.description: Manage project issues and tasks using the beads (bd) issue tracker

new-component.description: Scaffold a new shared/ui primitive component with proper FSD structure

new-feature.description: Scaffold a new feature slice with proper FSD structure

new-page.description: Scaffold a new page with route registration

lint-check.description: Run code quality checks including ESLint and TypeScript type checking

icons.description: Reference for using icons in the Layrix application
icons.note: All icons MUST come from quasar-extras-svg-icons/tabler-icons-v2

criticalRules.imports: Top-to-bottom only. No upward or horizontal imports within same layer
criticalRules.quasarIsolation: Quasar components ONLY in shared/ui/primitives/. All other layers use @shared/ui
criticalRules.barrelExports: Every slice must export through index.ts. No deep imports
criticalRules.dumbPages: Pages have no business logic, only widget composition
criticalRules.typeImports: Use 'import type' for type-only imports (enforced by ESLint)
